<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Página-1" id="b3nIkLwtG5HszlocjYIR"> <mxGraphModel dx="2606" dy="1927" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "graph TB
 subgraph Dominio
 AGG[\"Aggregate\n(Movimiento, Transferencia)\"]
 DEV[\"Domain Event\n(MovimientoCreated, MovimientoDeleted,\nTransferenciaCreated)\"]
 end

 subgraph Aplicacion
 HDL[\"Handler\n(StoreMovimientoHandler)\"]
 AEV[\"Application Event\n(AuditableActionOcurred,\nAttachmentsForMovimientoCreated)\"]
 end

 subgraph Infraestructura
 REP[\"EloquentRepository\n(store / update / delete)\"]
 EB[\"LaravelEventBus\n(publishMany / publish)\"]
 ED[\"Illuminate Events Dispatcher\"]
 end

 subgraph EventHandlers
 FH[\"MovimientoCreatedFinancialImpactEventHandler\"]
 AH[\"AuditoriaEventHandler\"]
 UPH[\"UploadAttachmentsHandler\"]
 DPH[\"DestroyAttachmentsHandler\"]
 TFH[\"ApplyTransactionEffectForCuentaWhenTransferenciaWasCreatedEventHandler\"]
 end

 AGG -->|\"recordThat()\"| DEV
 HDL -->|\"movimientoRepository.store()\"| REP
 REP -->|\"releaseEvents()\"| EB
 EB -->|\"dispatch()\"| ED
 ED --> FH
 HDL -->|\"eventBus.publish(AuditableActionOcurred)\"| EB
 EB --> AH
 HDL -->|\"eventBus.publish(AttachmentsForMovimientoCreated)\"| EB
 EB --> UPH",
 "config": null
